{{Infobox event
|name=Alice becomes trapped in the small room with her arms and legs extending out the window and chimney
|participants=Alice
|chapitre=4
}}

== Course of events ==

Alice becomes trapped in a small room with her arms extending out of the window and her legs extending into the chimney. This confinement follows her earlier encounters with a Mouse, a giant puppy, and a caterpillar smoking a hookah on a mushroom. The event precedes Alice being mistaken for the Rabbit's housemaid, when she is asked to retrieve missing items from his house.

== References ==

- Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

[[Category:Événements]]
